eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Vermont; at 2:20 PM on JUN 18, 2019 Effective until 4:20 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is the Vermont Department of Public Safety, Waterbury. This is a required monthly test of the emergency alert system.  

The broadcasters in your area in voluntary cooperation with the Department of Public Safety and other authorities have developed this system to keep you informed in the event of an actual emergency.  Had this been an actual emergency, the Department of Public Safety would have provided official information or instructions.
